enabled.description: Enable or disable the Telnyx SMS channel

dmPolicy.description: DM policy: allowlist, open, or disabled

allowFrom.description: Phone numbers allowed to message (E.164 format). Use "*" to allow all. Only applies when dmPolicy is "allowlist".

historyLimit.description: Number of past messages loaded into conversation context

blockStreaming.description: Buffer the full AI response before sending as SMS (recommended for SMS to avoid partial sends)

chunkMode.description: How to split long messages into SMS parts

textChunkLimit.description: Max characters per outbound SMS (Telnyx 10-part limit = 1500)

mediaMaxMb.description: Max MMS media size in MB

webhookPort.description: HTTP port for the inbound webhook server

webhookPath.description: URL path for the Telnyx webhook endpoint

gateNotify.description: Notify admin when unknown numbers text. Sends alert via another configured channel.

enabled.description: Enable gate notifications for unknown senders

notifyChannel.description: Channel to send admin alerts (e.g. discord, whatsapp)

notifyTarget.description: Target peer/user on the notify channel

rejectReply.description: Auto-reply message sent to rejected senders (leave empty for no reply)

cooldownMinutes.description: Minutes to wait before re-notifying about same number
